whyOneLine: mystery becomes the larger of a and b. Branch picks one side.
mystery becomes a + b. No branching.
walk an array field, keep the max. Q1 archetype on real T2.
same loop shape, < instead of >. Watch the comparison flip.
accumulate over the array; mystery is the running total.
count how many entries beat a threshold; mystery is the count.
find the first positive entry; break out of loop semantics.
sum then divide. Watch int vs double division.
mystery = a * b; simplest non-additive formula.
WITHOUT &, mutation never reaches caller. mystery stays at its initial value.
simplest trace: one assignment, one result. Start here.
trace x, y, mystery across each line. Track every variable.
who_am_i calls helper. Enter helper frame, compute, return.
temp lives inside compute, dies on return. Only the returned value survives.
both writes to data persist because & means same box as caller.
array element write via & persists in caller. numbers[2] becomes 99.
trace two function calls. Enter add_one twice, each returns +1.
chain of struct field mutations via &. Each line reads the updated value.
book: int id, string title, double price.
movie: int id, string title, int year.
student: int id, string name, double gpa.
product: int id, string description, double price.
employee: int id, string name, string department.
car: string make, string model, int year.
recipe: int id, string name, int servings.
song: string title, string artist, double duration.

movie variant: same shape, three different fields.
student variant; cin >> on a double field for gpa.
product: id, description, price.
employee variant; two strings.
car: two string fields then int.
recipe: id, name, servings.
song: title, artist, duration.

canonical Q4: const MAX, list[MAX], count, cin, call read, printf loop.
movie variant; year is %d not %.2f.
student variant; gpa formatted as %.2f.
product variant; description is the string field.
employee variant; two %s fields.
car variant; %s %s %d.
recipe variant.
song variant; duration as %.2f.
